item.title: backlog history title column always shows '-' — title not stored in archive
item.intent: backlog history shows real item titles. mark_complete archives the title field so history output is human-readable.
item.description: cmd_backlog_history displays a TITLE column and reads .title from sprints.jsonl, but mark_complete never writes a title field to the archive. Every row shows '-'. BUG-037 added the title column to the history output but missed adding title to the archive write in mark_complete.
steps: In mark_complete(), fetch the item title from the source backlog file alongside priority and category (extend the single jq call at line 1180 to also extract .title)
Pass title as --arg to the jq -cn archive write block and include title in the output JSON object
Verify: run a sprint, then run backlog history and confirm the title column shows the item title
acceptanceCriteria: mark_complete writes a title field to sprints.jsonl
backlog history title column shows item titles instead of '-'
